description: Sandbox was a service for creating mock or simulated API sandboxes for development and testing. The current getsandbox.com domain appears parked and offered for sale, but a historical public Swagger/OpenAPI document for its API is still available via APIs.guru.
summary: getsandbox.com has one known developer integration surface: a REST HTTP API (“Sandbox API”) documented by an OpenAPI/Swagger spec and authenticated with an API key header.
